migrations: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS app_version_history (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, version TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, migrations_run BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, whats_new_seen BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, migrated_at DATETIME, seen_at DATETIME, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_app_version_history_version ON app_version_history(version);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_app_version_history_migrations_run ON app_version_history(migrations_run);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_app_version_history_whats_new_seen ON app_version_history(whats_new_seen);

whatsNew.title: Welcome to Version Tracking!
whatsNew.content:
🎉 **Version tracking is now live!**

We've introduced automatic version tracking and database migration system to keep your app up-to-date seamlessly.

**What's new:**
- ✅ Automatic database migrations
- ✅ What's new notifications for each version
- ✅ No more manual update steps
- ✅ Smooth upgrade experience

From now on, you'll be notified about new features and improvements with each update!
